question: What two powers do Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' channel through their craft?

answers.original: Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' channel the power to spin 'Nebula-Yarn' and weave 'Galaxy-Patterns' that influence space-time.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

ops.description: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are a natural wonder located on the planet Ntulu.
Atlantean smiths work in pressurized forges.

entities.name: Cosmic 'Star-Weavers'
entities.description: Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' are beings capable of spinning 'Nebula-Yarn' and weaving 'Galaxy-Patterns' that influence space-time.

entities.name: Galaxy-Patterns
entities.description: Galaxy-Patterns are woven by Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' and have the power to bend space-time and affect entire star systems.

entities.name: Nebula-Yarn
entities.description: Nebula-Yarn is a material spun by Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' from stellar nurseries, glowing with the light of newborn stars.

entities.name: Star-Weaver Training
entities.description: Star-Weaver training is a lengthy process that lasts for geological ages.

relations.description: Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' weave 'Galaxy-Patterns' that can bend space-time.
Star-Weaver training lasts for geological ages.
Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' use the Universe-Loom to shape the fabric of space.
Galaxy-Patterns can create or destroy entire star systems.

entities.name: Glowing Flora
entities.description: Glowing flora are plants that emit light and are part of the Bioluminescent Forest's ecosystem.
